name: Mustard Sauce (Excellent with Corned-beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan.
2. Remove from heat and set aside to cool.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg with a rotary beater.
4. Add brown sugar, granulated sugar, prepared mustard, salt, and pepper to the beaten egg. Mix well until combined.
5. Pour in the cider vinegar and stir the mixture into the cooled butter.
6. Return the mixture to the saucepan over medium heat.
7. Bring to a boil and then reduce the heat. Simmer for 3 minutes.
8. Serve hot, along with old-fashioned Corned Beef and Cabbage.
